mentions.note: Doesn't typically recommend truckers, but a good number here would embolden further trucking exposure.

Fine quarter with 24% EPS growth from cost cuts and buybacks, but freight market remains 'fragile'—stock at 27x forward earnings now expensive; wait for freight recovery visibility before accumulating.
Best companies in truck industry that nobody listens to except Cramer; great conference call; after three down years industry finally on fire; stock headed higher.
